title: Combination Padlock Heavy Duty Locks - BeskooHome 4-Digit Weatherproof Combination Lock Resettable Combination Padlock Outdoor for Gym, School, Hasp, Outdoor Shed, Storage, Cabinet, Toolbox - 3 Pack
features: 🔥Robust & Durable: This updated combination padlock features a durable metal body with Zinc Alloy cover for durability. The heavy-duty steel shackle offers extra cut resistance. Protective weather cover prevents freezing and jamming.

🔥High Security: 4-digit combination padlock offers 10000 combinations, which make it much more security than the typical three digit locks, The shackle of this lock is strong enough and it hard be damaged by human force.

🔥Easy to Use: Easy to set and reset your own 4-digit combination for keyless convenience. Unique side window enable easy combination viewing. Come with a clear instruction. Once you've set the combination, you're safe and sound. No more fiddly keys.

🔥Suit for Different Occasions: This portable size(3.2in*1.7in*0.9in) combination padlock suits for indoor and outdoor use, ideal for gate, shed, cabinets, storage, gym, school, garage, tool box, hasp, luggage lockers, employee locker and more.
🔥WHAT YOU GET: 3X combination locks, user manual
description: Product Description BeskooHome's combination padlock - Design for low to medium security applications Set-Your-Own 4-digit Combination 4-digit combination padlock offers 10000 combinations, which make it much more security than the typical three digit lock. Resettable: Easy to set and reset your own preferred combinations. Body Material: Plated Steel and Zinc Alloy Product Weight: 128g (Each one) Size: 80mm*42mm Note: Please spray WD40 on the dials and locking mechanism to keep everything lubricated if use it outside. Heavy-duty and Weatherproof Combination Padlock Heavy Duty Made of high strength zinc alloy and heavy-duty carbon steel, which reduce the possibility of hammering, sawing, and protect against hack-saw attacks. High Security Equipped with an advanced damper design for accurate setting of your code. No random code set. Portable Compact size, light weight, and convenient for you to store and carry. Weatherproof It’s weather proof so you can use it outside without any problem. It can withstand rain and snow without rusting and jamming.
